name: Strategic Management and Opportunity Corporation
summary: Strategic Management and Opportunity Corporation offers Internet based marketing and advertising services. The company's video sales platform (VSP) offers sales solution for digital marketing, and enables people in online video production and advertising to log into a single interface, and sets pricing structures and preserve commission. It also develops social networking and broadcasting tools to add videos. The company serves Internet Yellow Pages and small business advertisers. Strategic Management and Opportunity Corporation was formerly known as SMO Multimedia Corporation and changed its name to Strategic Management and Opportunity Corporation in July 2004. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Miami Beach, Florida. The company has an additional location in Everson, Washington.
